facts.statement: International Business Machines Corporation is listed on the NYSE and uses the ticker IBM.
IBM's SEC submissions metadata describes its SIC category as Computer & office Equipment.
IBM reported FY2025 revenues of $61.86 billion.
IBM reported FY2025 net income of $7.502 billion.
IBM reported FY2025 operating cash flow of $13.931 billion.
IBM reported FY2025 research and development expense of $6.775 billion.
IBM reported stockholders' equity of $27.307 billion at FY2025 year-end.
IBM reported long-term debt of $49.884 billion at FY2025 year-end.
IBM reported cash and cash equivalents of $13.947 billion at FY2025 year-end.
IBM's 2025 operating segments include Software, Consulting, Infrastructure, and Financing.
IBM's software-related operating segments in the filing include Hybrid Cloud, Automation, Data, and Transaction Processing.
IBM's consulting-related operating segments in the filing include Strategy and Technology and Intelligent Operations.
IBM's infrastructure-related operating segments in the filing include Hybrid Infrastructure and Infrastructure Support.
IBM's financing segment includes Financing Services and Used Equipment Sales.
IBM's 2025 filing includes a revenue remaining performance obligation disclosure for periods one and two, indicating contracted future revenue is material enough to be separately tracked.
IBM's 2025 filing references acquisition-related operating segments and acquisition-specific compensation plans, including plans for HashiCorp and 2025 acquisitions.
IBM's 2025 filing states that the IBM HashiCorp Acquisition Long-Term Performance Plan was adopted in connection with IBM's acquisition of HashiCorp, Inc. on February 27, 2025.
IBM's 2025 filing references the StreamSets and WebMethods acquisition as part of its 2024 acquisition-related disclosures.
IBM's 2026 proxy statement says Arvind Krishna is Chairman of the Board, President and Chief Executive Officer.
IBM's 2026 proxy statement says James J. Kavanaugh is Senior Vice President, Finance and Operations, and Chief Financial Officer.
IBM's 2026 proxy statement says the Board actively oversees enterprise risk, including cybersecurity, talent management, and responsible business initiatives.

IBM's 2026 proxy statement says the company maintains a year-round stockholder engagement process and uses feedback from those engagements to inform practices and policies across areas including AI, corporate governance, board composition, and executive compensation.
IBM's 2026 proxy statement says the Board added Ramon Laguarta to the Board since the last Annual Meeting.

IBM's 2025 annual report states that 32,163,174 equity awards were outstanding or available under equity compensation plans at December 31, 2025, and 40,998,234 securities remained available for future issuance.

IBM's 2025 annual report shows allowance for credit losses increased from $273 million at the start of 2025 to $276 million at year-end, and revenue-based provisions increased from $298 million to $388 million.
